mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT c.id as category_id, c.name as category_name, c.description as category_description, b.id as book_id, b.title as book_title, b.isbn as book_isbn, b.publication_year as book_publication_year, a.id as author_id, a.name as author_name, a.birth_date as author_birth_date, a.country as author_country FROM categories c LEFT JOIN book_categories bc ON c.id = bc.category_id LEFT JOIN books b ON bc.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN authors a ON b.author_id = a.id ORDER BY c.id, b.id
